title: recruitment and hiring for the position of Fleet Manager Starting June 27, 2025

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Montana Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Related to the recruitment and hiring for the position of Fleet Manager Starting June 27, 2025
1.	All applications and submitted resumes.
2.	All interview scoring sheets, evaluation forms, ranking or scoring records, and evaluation notes used to assess candidates.
3.	The final hiring recommendation, including any memos, attachments, or supporting documentation.

Where applicable, please include records reflecting compliance with the City of Bozeman Ethics Policy, the City of Bozeman Employee Handbook, and any fair hiring or equal employment opportunity procedures or documentation used in this hiring process.
Preferred format: electronic copies (PDF or searchable format). If fees will apply, please provide an estimate before processing. I request a waiver or reduction of fees if permitted, because disclosure would serve the public interest in transparency of municipal hiring practices.
Redaction request: To protect personal privacy consistent with Montana law, please redact only the minimum personal information necessary (personal phone numbers, personal email addresses, home addresses, social security numbers, and other clearly private identifiers) and release the remainder of the records, including professional qualifications, work history, interview scores or rankings, and substantive hiring recommendation and rationale.
If any records or portions are withheld, please cite the specific statutory exemption under Mont. Code Ann. § 2-6-101 et seq. relied upon for each withholding and provide a description sufficient to identify the nature of withheld material

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

John777
